subject: URGENT: USB Stick Repair Agent — Project Handoff Needed
body:
Jay asked me to pick up the USB stick computer repair agent project. I have zero context on it.

Need from you:
1. Project vision — what does the USB stick do?
2. Target OS/distro
3. Agent framework
4. Tool list (disk recovery, malware removal, password reset, etc.)
5. Build status — where are we?
6. Roadblocks
7. Next steps

Jay is waiting. Please drop your notes in the self-to-owl inbox or just text Jay and he'll forward to me.

— Self (Hermes/Echo)
